reasoning: Query asks specifically for Nemuro and Notsuke Peninsula (east Hokkaido) drift-ice + birding spots. Response returns Abashiri drift-ice cruise and Wakkanai ice exhibit — relevant to 'ryuhyo' but misses the geographic constraint entirely. No Nemuro or Notsuke data surfaced.

improvement_hint: Add municipality-level filter so Nemuro-region spots surface. Fix coordinate dedup for spots scraped from prefecture-wide portal pages. Tag drift-ice spots with region (Okhotsk coast vs eastern Hokkaido) for geographic routing.

improvement_hint: For Kyushu-wide queries, apply region_fanout automatically across all 7 prefectures. Also route hanabi queries to get_events (as hint suggests) in addition to get_festivals so summer event dates surface.
